summary: Completed comprehensive testing of two specific feature updates: Multi-Image Slider and Admin Password Reset. Both features are fully implemented and working correctly. Backend API supports comma-separated image URLs, frontend displays image slider with navigation arrows, thumbnails, and counter. Admin password change section is present with proper validation.
passed_tests: Backend API: POST /api/admin/change-password endpoint working (100% success)
Backend API: Password validation - minimum 6 characters enforced
Backend API: Password validation - wrong old password returns 401
Backend API: Password validation - missing fields return 400
Backend API: Multi-image product creation with comma-separated URLs
Backend API: Product retrieval with comma-separated main_image field
Admin Login: Successful authentication with admin/admin123 credentials
Admin Dashboard: Three tabs (Inventory, Banners, Settings) accessible
Admin Settings: Change Password section present and functional
Admin Settings: Current Password, New Password, Confirm Password fields present
Admin Settings: Change Password button available
Admin Inventory: Add Product dialog supports multi-image URLs
Frontend: Product detail page parses comma-separated URLs correctly
Frontend: Multi-image slider shows navigation arrows when multiple images
Frontend: Image counter displays current/total format (e.g., '1 / 3')
Frontend: Thumbnail strip appears for multi-image products
ProductCard: Displays first image from comma-separated URLs correctly
